'''hochazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twentieth|twentieth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twentieth|twentieth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hochazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochazithi|hochazithi]] || [[word:hochaziji|hochaziji]] || [[word:hochazishi|hochazishi]] || [[word:hochaziki|hochaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochazuthuthu|hochazuthuthu]] || [[word:hochazujuju|hochazujuju]] || [[word:hochazushushu|hochazushushu]] || [[word:hochazukuku|hochazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochazuthu|hochazuthu]] || [[word:hochazuju|hochazuju]] || [[word:hochazushu|hochazushu]] || [[word:hochazuku|hochazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochazufthuf|hochazufthuf]] || [[word:hochazufjuf|hochazufjuf]] || [[word:hochazufshuf|hochazufshuf]] || [[word:hochazufkuf|hochazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochazethe|hochazethe]] || [[word:hochazeje|hochazeje]] || [[word:hochazeshe|hochazeshe]] || [[word:hochazeke|hochazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochazothotho|hochazothotho]] || [[word:hochazojojo|hochazojojo]] || [[word:hochazoshosho|hochazoshosho]] || [[word:hochazokoko|hochazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochazotho|hochazotho]] || [[word:hochazojo|hochazojo]] || [[word:hochazosho|hochazosho]] || [[word:hochazoko|hochazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochazofthof|hochazofthof]] || [[word:hochazofjof|hochazofjof]] || [[word:hochazofshof|hochazofshof]] || [[word:hochazofkof|hochazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochazïfthïf|hochazïfthïf]] || [[word:hochazïfjïf|hochazïfjïf]] || [[word:hochazïfshïf|hochazïfshïf]] || [[word:hochazïfkïf|hochazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochazïfthïfthïf|hochazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:hochazïfjïfjïf|hochazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:hochazïfshïfshïf|hochazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:hochazïfkïfkïf|hochazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochazïfthïf|hochazïfthïf]] || [[word:hochazïfjïf|hochazïfjïf]] || [[word:hochazïfshïf|hochazïfshïf]] || [[word:hochazïfkïf|hochazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochazïfthïf|hochazïfthïf]] || [[word:hochazïfjïf|hochazïfjïf]] || [[word:hochazïfshïf|hochazïfshïf]] || [[word:hochazïfkïf|hochazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochazæthæ|hochazæthæ]] || [[word:hochazæjæ|hochazæjæ]] || [[word:hochazæshæ|hochazæshæ]] || [[word:hochazækæ|hochazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochazathatha|hochazathatha]] || [[word:hochazajaja|hochazajaja]] || [[word:hochazashasha|hochazashasha]] || [[word:hochazakaka|hochazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochazatha|hochazatha]] || [[word:hochazaja|hochazaja]] || [[word:hochazasha|hochazasha]] || [[word:hochazaka|hochazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochazafthaf|hochazafthaf]] || [[word:hochazafjaf|hochazafjaf]] || [[word:hochazafshaf|hochazafshaf]] || [[word:hochazafkaf|hochazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hochazasha|hochazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hochazshësha|hochazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hochazrosha|hochazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hochazmusha|hochazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hochazyasha|hochazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohochaznkshësha|gohochaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohochaznkrosha|gohochaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohochaznkmusha|gohochaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohochaznkyasha|gohochaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hochachazasha|hochachazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hochachazshësha|hochachazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hochachazrosha|hochachazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hochachazmusha|hochachazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hochachazyasha|hochachazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohochachaznkshësha|gohochachaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohochachaznkrosha|gohochachaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohochachaznkmusha|gohochachaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohochachaznkyasha|gohochachaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hechæzasha|hechæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hechæzshësha|hechæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hechæzrosha|hechæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hechæzmusha|hechæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hechæzyasha|hechæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohechæznkshësha|gohechæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohechæznkrosha|gohechæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohechæznkmusha|gohechæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohechæznkyasha|gohechæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hochfazasha|hochfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hochfazshësha|hochfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hochfazrosha|hochfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hochfazmusha|hochfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hochfazyasha|hochfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohochfaznkshësha|gohochfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohochfaznkrosha|gohochfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohochfaznkmusha|gohochfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohochfaznkyasha|gohochfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
